title: Mac OS 9
desc: Mac OS 9 wallpaper represents the visual aesthetics of the classic Mac era, featuring clean blue gradients and refined gloss effects. This design reflects Apple's pursuit of elegance and functionality in the pre-Aqua era, with soft tones and clean composition providing users with a comfortable desktop environment, a precious legacy in Apple's design history.

title: macOS Public Beta
desc: macOS Public Beta wallpaper debuts with the iconic Aqua interface style, with blue water droplet texture marking the beginning of Apple's new century design language. Crystal-clear gloss effects and deep blue gradients showcase Apple's exploration of 'digital water' aesthetics. As Steve Jobs said, this is a design that 'makes you want to lick it.'

title: Mac OS X 10.0 Cheetah
desc: Mac OS X Cheetah wallpaper uses Aqua blue as its primary color, combined with refined water droplet gloss effects, pioneering a new era of macOS visual design. Flowing blue gradients and translucent textures symbolize Mac OS X's revolutionary innovation. This wallpaper is viewed by design historians as 'the groundbreaking work that defined 21st-century digital aesthetics.'

title: Mac OS X 10.1 Puma
desc: Puma wallpaper continues the Aqua design language, featuring more mature blue gradients and refined lighting effects. Crystal-like texture and elegant color transitions showcase Apple's design team's ultimate attention to detail. This wallpaper embodies Apple's brand spirit of 'pursuit of perfection.'

title: Mac OS X 10.2 Jaguar
desc: Jaguar wallpaper features a dynamic blue X logo as its core visual element, with radiant design symbolizing Mac OS X's powerful performance and unlimited potential. This wallpaper first perfectly fuses brand symbols with visual aesthetics, considered a classic interpretation of Apple's 'design is brand' philosophy.

title: Mac OS X 10.3 Panther
desc: Panther wallpaper centers on a silver metallic X logo, with tech-savvy design highlighting Mac's professional positioning. Cool metallic gloss and precise reflection effects reflect Apple's pursuit of industrial design aesthetics. Jony Ive commented on this period: 'We gave software the texture of hardware.'

title: Mac OS X 10.4 Tiger
desc: Tiger wallpaper features starry galaxy themes, pioneering macOS's tradition of natural landscape wallpapers. The vast universe and twinkling starlight symbolize Mac's unlimited creative possibilities. This wallpaper perfectly fuses abstract aesthetics with natural imagery, rated by Fast Company as 'a masterpiece that turns desktops into windows to the universe.'

title: Mac OS X 10.5 Leopard
desc: Leopard wallpaper features aurora-like purple starry skies, with dreamy colors and deep spatial sense creating unprecedented visual experiences. Gradient purple-blue tones and scattered starlight reflect Apple's romantic interpretation of cosmic aesthetics. This wallpaper is still considered one of the most artistic designs in macOS history.

title: Mac OS X 10.6 Snow Leopard
desc: Snow Leopard wallpaper features a magnificent snow leopard close-up, with pure white fur and deep eyes showcasing the stunning power of natural beauty. High-definition photography and refined post-processing reflect Apple's ultimate pursuit of visual quality. This wallpaper marks macOS wallpaper's transition from abstract to nature photography.

title: Mac OS X 10.7 Lion
desc: Lion wallpaper features starry galaxies and elegant space imagery, with deep blue-purple tones and vast starlight creating serene yet spectacular visual effects. This wallpaper continues Apple's exploration of cosmic aesthetics while laying the aesthetic foundation for the later California place name series' return from space to nature.

title: Mac OS X 10.0-10.7
desc: The wallpaper design journey from Mac OS X 10.0 to 10.7 witnessed Apple's visual evolution from Aqua water droplet aesthetics to cosmic starscapes. This period's wallpapers primarily use blue tones, from crystal water droplets to vast galaxies, showcasing the continuous exploration and maturation of Apple's design language, becoming a classic chapter in digital design history.

title: OS X 10.8 Mountain Lion
desc: Mountain Lion wallpaper continues the starry theme with more magnificent galaxy landscapes as its visual core. The deep universe and brilliant Milky Way symbolize Mac's unlimited possibilities. This wallpaper maintains elegance while preparing aesthetic groundwork for the upcoming California place name series.

title: OS X 10.9 Mavericks
desc: Mavericks wallpaper features massive waves from California's famous surfing destination, pioneering macOS's new tradition of California landmark naming. Magnificent waves and azure waters showcase the grandeur and dynamism of natural forces. This wallpaper is praised by design critics as 'a stroke of genius that infuses California spirit into every Mac.'

title: OS X 10.10 Yosemite
desc: Yosemite wallpaper features El Capitan rock wall from Yosemite National Park, with majestic natural landscapes perfectly matching flat design language. Dynamic wallpapers from sunrise to nightfall showcase Apple's poetic capture of time and light. As Jony Ive stated: 'True minimalism is letting natural beauty strike the heart directly.'

title: OS X 10.11 El Capitan
desc: El Capitan wallpaper focuses on Yosemite's most representative granite monolith, with morning light revealing warm golden glow on the rock wall. Refined photography and perfect color reproduction reflect Apple's deep understanding of natural aesthetics. This wallpaper was praised by National Geographic photographers as 'a perfect fusion of commerce and art.'

title: OS X 10.8-10.11
desc: The wallpaper series from OS X 10.8 to 10.11 marks macOS's aesthetic transition from cosmic themes to California natural landscapes. From galaxy starscapes to Mavericks' waves, then to Yosemite's majestic rock formations, Apple tells a visual story of returning from space to earth through wallpapers, embodying the unique charm of 'California design.'

title: macOS 10.12 Sierra
desc: Sierra wallpaper features the magnificent snow scenery of the Sierra Nevada mountains, with pure white snow and azure sky creating a fresh and bright visual experience. This wallpaper perfectly accompanies the milestone moment of Siri coming to Mac, considered a visual expression of Apple's 'pure intelligence' design philosophy.

title: macOS 10.13 High Sierra
desc: High Sierra wallpaper features higher altitude snow peaks of the Sierra Nevada mountains, with silver-clad summits gleaming with sacred light under the sun. Gradient blue-purple sky contrasts strongly with white snow mountains, reflecting Apple's ultimate pursuit of natural grandeur.

title: macOS 10.14 Mojave
desc: Mojave wallpaper features the magnificent sand dunes of the Mojave Desert, introducing for the first time the dynamic desktop feature that changes with time. 24 variations from sunrise to midnight showcase the poetic flow of desert light and shadow. This wallpaper is praised by the design community as 'a revolutionary innovation that brings the beauty of time to desktops,' perfectly complementing the introduction of dark mode.

title: macOS 10.15 Catalina
desc: Catalina wallpaper features Catalina Island from California's Channel Islands, with azure waters and golden cliffs creating the warm atmosphere of California sunshine. Dynamic wallpapers that change from day to night continue Mojave's time aesthetics, showcasing Apple's romantic interpretation of island scenery.

title: macOS 11 Big Sur
desc: Big Sur wallpaper draws inspiration from the Big Sur coastline along California's Highway 1, pioneering macOS's entirely new visual language. Layered mountains, gradient colors, and dreamy lighting mark Apple's aesthetic transition from realistic photography to artistic illustration. This wallpaper is rated by Jony Ive's successors as 'a milestone that redefines digital landscapes.'

title: macOS 12 Monterey
desc: Monterey wallpaper continues Big Sur's artistic style, featuring Monterey Bay's waves and reefs. Flowing colors and abstract wave lines create visual effects that are both dynamic and serene. This wallpaper showcases Apple's continued exploration of California coastal aesthetics.

title: macOS 13 Ventura
desc: Ventura wallpaper draws inspiration from California's Ventura coastal scenery, with rainbow-like color gradients and elegant curves forming highly recognizable visual symbols. This design is considered a perfect interpretation of Apple's 'color is emotion' philosophy, bringing users a joyful and vibrant desktop experience.

title: macOS 14 Sonoma
desc: Sonoma wallpaper features California's Sonoma wine country, with golden sunlight cascading over rolling hills. The newly introduced dynamic wallpaper screensaver feature lets magnificent aerial footage flow gently. This wallpaper is rated by Wired as 'turning Mac desktops into living art pieces.'

title: macOS 15 Sequoia
desc: Sequoia wallpaper features towering giant trees from California's Sequoia National Park, with an upward-looking perspective showcasing the majesty and vitality of redwoods. Warm sunlight filtering through the canopy casts golden rays, reflecting Apple's design expression of reverence for nature. This wallpaper symbolizes the strength and longevity of the Mac ecosystem.

title: macOS 26 Tahoe
desc: macOS Tahoe wallpaper draws inspiration from Lake Tahoe's crystal-clear waters, fusing the cutting-edge aesthetics of liquid glass design language. Translucent layering and flowing light effects perfectly echo the new system interface design. This wallpaper is praised by design critics as 'yet another revolutionary evolution of Apple's visual language,' defining the aesthetic standard for the next generation of macOS.
